title: selaginella suffruticosa
intro: Selaginella suffruticosa, also known as Chinese spikenard, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Selaginella suffruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
